description: Merge conflict failed at tier ai-resolve. Branch: overstory/config-utils-builder/pebblr-6be3. Agent: config-utils-builder. Conflicting files: web/src/routes/planner/daily.tsx.

name: rebase-conflict-dual-import
description: Rebase conflict resolution pattern: when two branches independently extract utilities from the same file, the resolved file needs BOTH import blocks and NEITHER set of inline definitions. Cherry-pick onto a fresh branch from main, resolve each conflict by keeping both imports and removing all inline duplicates, verify with bun run test + bun run lint + bunx tsc --noEmit.
